title: Cross-Module Integration
objective: Build tested bidirectional bridges between storyboard and thriller-writing, interactive-fiction, and external narrative editors. Define formal mapping rules, data format converters, and quality contracts at each boundary.
storyQuestions: How should thriller-writing clue-design annotations map to PROVIDES/RAISES?
What VN node properties can be auto-generated from storyboard JSON?
Can external narrative editors represent shot-level directives via generic node models?
How should branching narrative affect storyboard design?
baseAcceptanceChecks: thriller-writing scene-to-storyboard mapping with 10+ field correspondences
VN node generation spec: storyboard JSON -> VN node properties
Generic narrative editor mapping: storyboard -> node creation via Resolver
At least one end-to-end test: script -> storyboard -> VN nodes
